message.content: {"items":[{"title":"European Social Survey 2008, Germany","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4766","justification":"Contains German data for 2008 with variables on migration attitudes, political trust, institutions, and aspects of community life; regional identifiers allow extraction of North Rhine-Westphalia subsamples for analysis in the 2000s."},{"title":"European Social Survey 2006, Germany","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4500","justification":"Covers Germany in 2006 with rich items on immigration, social cohesion, political institutions, and community relations; includes regional information enabling analyses focused on North Rhine-Westphalia during the 2000s."},{"title":"European Social Survey 2004, Germany","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4229","justification":"Provides 2004 German microdata with questions on immigration, community integration, political trust, and civic engagement; regional identifiers can be used to isolate respondents from North Rhine-Westphalia in the 2000s."},{"title":"European Social Survey 2002, Germany","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA3999","justification":"First ESS round for Germany (2002) includes extensive items on social and political life, including attitudes toward migrants and public institutions; allows subnational analysis including North Rhine-Westphalia for the early 2000s."},{"title":"Politbarometer West 2000 (Kumulierte Jahresdatei)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA3384","justification":"Monthly survey series for West Germany including questions on migration, government, parties, and political institutions; region variables allow selection of respondents from North Rhine-Westphalia at the beginning of the 2000s."},{"title":"Politbarometer West 2001 (Kumulierte Jahresdatei)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA3619","justification":"Provides repeated cross-sections for 2001 with items on migration policy, political system evaluations, and social conditions; includes regional codes suitable for analysis of North Rhine-Westphalia."},{"title":"Politbarometer West 2005 (Kumulierte Jahresdatei)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4349","justification":"Contains 2005 West German survey data on political preferences, institutions, and occasionally migration-related topics; regional identifiers allow focusing on North Rhine-Westphalia’s population in the mid-2000s."},{"title":"Politbarometer West 2007 (Kumulierte Jahresdatei)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4628","justification":"Includes 2007 West German data covering government performance, political organisations, and salient issues such as migration; region variables support analyses restricted to North Rhine-Westphalia in the late 2000s."},{"title":"German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 2002","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA3690","justification":"Nationwide survey with detailed items on social structure, community life, political attitudes and some migration-related questions; federal-state identifiers allow isolating respondents in North Rhine-Westphalia in 2002."},{"title":"German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 2006","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4504","justification":"ALLBUS 2006 contains modules on social integration, urban/rural living conditions, political institutions, and perceptions of foreigners; state-level identifiers make it suitable for studying North Rhine-Westphalia in the mid‑2000s."}]}
